text: The express.json 25MB limit applies to raw JSON body size, not file size. Since customer form images are sent as base64 in JSON (not multipart), a 19MB binary image encodes to ~25.3MB base64 JSON and is rejected with 413. However, compressImageForAI() in photoValidation.ts resizes all images to max 1600px JPEG 0.82 quality before upload, making real-world payloads well under 1MB. The server limit is only relevant for direct API abuse.
issue: E2E testing N2/N3 — file size limit behavior runtime test
